resource.name: tooManyInspectionItemsOnScreen
resource.object: There are only {0} inspection items allowed on a single column screen, currently there are {1} items on the screen. Please remove items before changing layout.

resource.name: tooManyInspectionItemsOnScreenWithGrading
resource.object: There are only {0} inspection items allowed on a single column screen with grading, currently there are {1} items on the screen. Please remove items before changing layout.

resource.name: maxRepeatReached
resource.object: Maximum number of repetitions has been reached.

resource.name: minRepeatNotReached
resource.object: Repeated items need to be recorded at least {0} times.

resource.name: NoAccess
resource.object: User does not have access to this operation

resource.name: ConfirmSaveChanges
resource.object: Do you want to save changes?

resource.name: InsufficientAccessLevel
resource.object: Insufficient access level, could not sign response

resource.name: accesslevel.hint
resource.object: Minimum access level needed for signature

resource.name: ScreenLayout.Description
resource.object: How to organize items on screen

resource.name: FullScreen
resource.object: There is no more room on this screen

resource.name: ConfirmCloseFormWithoutSave
resource.object: You have made changes that cannot be saved, do you still want to close the form?

resource.name: ConfirmSaveChanges
resource.object: Do you want to save changes?

resource.name: GenerateConfirm
resource.object: You are about to create a database view for the selected inspection procedure.\n This may overwrite any existing views that might be in use as datasources in your custom reports.\n Are you sure you want to continue?

resource.name: GenerateSuccess
resource.object: The following views were successfully created and added to your database: \n{0}

resource.name: GenerateError
resource.object: Error: Database view could not be created. See log for further details.

resource.name: uoError
resource.object: Error occured during UO execution. Result code:{0}

resource.name: deviceIdNoSet
resource.object: Device ID not set in XML configuration

resource.name: configDeviceIdNotCorrect
resource.object: Device {0} does not exist in table devices

resource.name: reportGuiIdEmpty
resource.object: Configuration error!\nReport gui item id is 0

resource.name: RunUnitOperationText
resource.object: Do you want to run unit operation {0}?

resource.name: UnitOperationNeeded
resource.object: This response needs to have a unit operation assigned to it.

resource.name: InsufficientAccessLevel
resource.object: Insufficient access level, could not sign the following responses:

resource.name: NeedsOnlyOneResponse
resource.object: Exactly one response must be confirmed to finish!

resource.name: NeedsOnlyOneResponseGroups
resource.object: Exactly one response must be confirmed for each group to finish!

resource.name: AtMostOneResponseGroups
resource.object: At most one response must be confirmed for each group to finish!

resource.name: AtMostOneResponse
resource.object: At most one response must be confirmed to finish!

resource.name: confirmStopInspection
resource.object: Are you sure you want to stop this inspection?

resource.name: confirmStopInspection
resource.object: Are you sure you want to stop this inspection?

resource.name: confirmDeleteInspection
resource.object: Are you sure you want to delete this registration?

resource.name: RunUnitOperationText
resource.object: Do you want to run unit operation {0}?

resource.name: UnitOperationNeeded
resource.object: This response needs to have a unit operation assigned to it.

resource.name: NotSuportedBody
resource.object: This response is not supported on this device

resource.name: NeedsOnlyOneResponse
resource.object: Exactly one response must be confirmed to finish!

resource.name: NeedsOnlyOneResponseGroups
resource.object: Exactly one response must be confirmed for each group to finish!

resource.name: AtMostOneResponseGroups
resource.object: At most one response must be confirmed for each group to finish!

resource.name: AtMostOneResponse
resource.object: At most one response must be confirmed to finish!

resource.name: confirmQuit
resource.object: Are you sure you want to quit?

resource.name: MissingValueList
resource.object: An item of value type list must have a value list attached.

resource.name: noBarcodeInterpreterSetUP
resource.object: No barcode interpreter set up for this kind of barcode

resource.name: noBarcodeInterpreterSetUP
resource.object: No barcode interpreter set up for this kind of barcode

resource.name: noBarcodeInterpreterSetUP
resource.object: No barcode interpreter set up for this kind of barcode

resource.name: notM6kApp
resource.object: This CE runs only on M6000/IPC.

resource.name: noStationId
resource.object: This CE requires station id in system program xml

resource.name: UnitsLoadedWitError
resource.object: {0}: Units loaded. {1} had wrong unit type.

resource.name: RowCountTooLow
resource.object: Illegal value: There are too many items on the screen.

resource.name: ColumnCountTooLow
resource.object: Illegal value: There are too many items on the screen.

resource.name: description.Text
resource.object: Each item-material combination can only be recorded once. Please choose a new item-material combination for the clone:

resource.name: description.Text
resource.object: Each item-material combination can only be recorded once. Please choose a new item-material combination for the clone:

resource.name: NoCloneText
resource.object: The selected combination already exists. No clone was made

resource.name: MustContainValue
resource.object: The field must be filled in

resource.name: MustContainValue
resource.object: The field must be filled in

resource.name: RepeatedMustContainValue
resource.object: All instances must be filled in

resource.name: ValidationFailed
resource.object: Some required items have not been filled in.

resource.name: SignaturesMissing
resource.object: Some responses have not been signed.

resource.name: ValidationFailed
resource.object:
Some required items have not been filled in.

 OK - Continue without saving changes
 Cancel - Fix the inspection.

resource.name: ConfirmSaveChanges
resource.object: Do you want to save changes?

resource.name: GetSaveMethod
resource.object:
Do you want to mark the inspection as complete?

 Yes - Save the inspection as Complete
 No - Save the inspection as In progress
 Cancel - Lose changes

resource.name: ChangeCompleteToIncomplete
resource.object:
These changes require the inspection to be marked as In progress. Do you want to continue?

 Yes - Save the inspection as In progress
 No - Lose changes

resource.name: SignaturesMissing
resource.object: Some responses have not been signed.

resource.name: ValidationFailedMessage
resource.object: The Item value is incorrectly formatted. This search will yield no results

resource.name: ConfirmValueTypeChange
resource.object: Are you sure you want to change the Value type?\nThis will clear the Criteria field.

resource.name: MissingObjectTable
resource.object: Items of value type ObjectId must have an Object table.

resource.name: DeleteSeriesConfirmation
resource.object: It's not possible to delete a series that has started.\nDo you want to delete all remaining occurrances?

resource.name: EditSeriesConfirmation
resource.object: It's not possible to change a series that has started.\nDo you want to change all remaining occurrances?

resource.name: DeleteError
resource.object: It's not possible to delete a schedule that has already started.

resource.name: UpdateError
resource.object: It's not possible to change a schedule that has already started.

resource.name: lDeleteSeries.Text
resource.object: Do you want to delete all occurrences of the series, or just this one?

resource.name: NaN
resource.object: The value entered is not a properly formatted number

resource.name: ValuesMustBeEntered
resource.object: You must enter values in both fields

resource.name: PictureValidateError
resource.object: This picture is big and might not be displayed correctly

resource.name: NoContext
resource.object: No qc context found for process {0} and procedure {1}

resource.name: ObjectTypeValueChangeMessage
resource.object: Are you sure you want to change the object type value?\nThis will clear the constraint object field.

resource.name: SchedulerDisabledDescription
resource.object: Scheduler is disabled for this application

resource.name: NeedsResponse
resource.object: Not all responses have been confirmed

resource.name: NeedsOnlyOneResponse
resource.object: Exactly one response must be confirmed to finish

resource.name: timeslotInvalid
resource.object: Minimum time slot is one minute

resource.name: PreImport
resource.object: {0} procedures will be imported. {1} will be skipped. Do you wish to continue?

resource.name: FindLackingExtCodes
resource.object: Finding all export items lacking ExtCode...

resource.name: AllNeedExtCode
resource.object: All exported items must have an ExtCode. On import, ExtCode is used to correlate between values on export and import.

resource.name: PleaseAddExtCodes
resource.object: Please add ExtCode to the following items before retrying:

resource.name: RemoveReferences
resource.object: Removing foreign key refereneces to non-exported items...

resource.name: ReferencesRemoved
resource.object: {0} entries have had references to non-exported items removed.

resource.name: ErrorExportingXml
resource.object: Error occurred during export to XML.

resource.name: checkShowNormalDistributionCurve.Properties.Caption
resource.object: Show normal distribution curve on capability graph

resource.name: checkResetNofMcounterIfInControl.Properties.Caption
resource.object: Reset N of M counter if in Control

resource.name: checkAutoUpdateControlLimits.Properties.Caption
resource.object: Use auto update of control limits
